claims.summary: BridgeState::new should initialize pressure_trend_samples_v1 empty and safety_level Green so stale or unsafe state is not fabricated at boot.
Bridge reciprocity should distinguish one-sided lane states, including stale telemetry with recent sensory output, without collapsing the socket to dead.
bridge_dynamic_stale_window_ms may become too sensitive to entropy or pressure; it needs evidence that the stale boundary is discrete and not flickering.
